name: Zombie
description: A hostile mob that spawns in dark areas. Burns in sunlight and drops rotten flesh.

name: Skeleton
description: Shoots arrows and burns in sunlight. Drops bones and arrows.

name: Creeper
description: Silently approaches and explodes. Drops gunpowder. Killed by a charged Creeper to drop a music disc.

name: Spider
description: Hostile at night, neutral in daylight. Climbs walls and drops string and spider eyes.

name: Cave Spider
description: A smaller, venomous spider found in mineshafts and strongholds.

name: Enderman
description: A tall mob that teleports and picks up blocks. Aggressive if looked at. Drops ender pearls.

name: Witch
description: Throws splash potions. Spawns in swamps and raids. Drops potion ingredients.

name: Slime
description: Spawns in swamps and slime chunks. Splits when killed. Drops slime balls.

name: Phantom
description: Flying mob that attacks players who haven't slept. Drops phantom membrane.

name: Drowned
description: Underwater zombies that can spawn with tridents. Drops copper and rotten flesh.

name: Husk
description: A desert variant of zombie that does not burn in sunlight. Drops rotten flesh.

name: Stray
description: A skeleton variant found in cold biomes. Shoots arrows of Slowness.

name: Blaze
description: Found in Nether fortresses. Shoots fireballs. Drops blaze rods.

name: Ghast
description: Flying Nether mob that shoots explosive fireballs. Drops ghast tears and gunpowder.

name: Magma Cube
description: Nether variant of slime. Splits when killed. Drops magma cream.

name: Wither Skeleton
description: Spawns in Nether fortresses. Inflicts Wither. Drops coal, bones, and rarely skulls.

name: Piglin
description: Neutral if wearing gold armor. Hostile if attacked. Barters gold ingots.

name: Piglin Brute
description: A stronger hostile Piglin variant found in Bastion Remnants. Always hostile.

name: Hoglin
description: A hostile boar-like mob in the Nether. Drops porkchops and leather.

name: Zoglin
description: A zombified Hoglin. Hostile to most mobs and players.

name: Ender Dragon
description: The final boss of Minecraft. Lives in the End. Defeat by destroying crystals then attacking.

name: Wither
description: A boss spawned with soul sand and skulls. Drops a nether star.

name: Warden
description: A powerful mob spawned by sculk shriekers. Blind but senses vibrations. Avoid if possible.

name: Iron Golem
description: A neutral mob that protects villages. Can be built from iron blocks and a carved pumpkin.

name: Snow Golem
description: A passive mob built from snow blocks and a carved pumpkin. Throws snowballs at hostile mobs.

name: Villager
description: Passive mob that trades items. Lives in villages. Profession changes with job blocks.

name: Wandering Trader
description: A villager that spawns randomly and offers rare trades. Leashed to llamas.

name: Cow
description: Passive mob that drops beef and leather. Can be milked with a bucket.

name: Pig
description: Passive mob that drops porkchops. Can be ridden with a saddle and carrot on a stick.

name: Sheep
description: Passive mob that drops wool and mutton. Can be sheared for wool.

name: Chicken
description: Passive mob that drops feathers and raw chicken. Lays eggs.

name: Rabbit
description: Small passive mob that drops rabbit hide, meat, and feet. Can be bred with carrots.

name: Mooshroom
description: Cow variant found on mushroom islands. Can be milked for mushroom stew or milk.

name: Horse
description: Passive mob that can be tamed and ridden. Varies in speed and health.

name: Donkey
description: Can be tamed, ridden, and equipped with a chest for storage.

name: Mule
description: Born from a horse and donkey. Can carry a chest and be ridden.

name: Llama
description: Passive mob that can carry chests and forms caravans. Spits at hostile mobs.

name: Wolf
description: Neutral mob that can be tamed with bones. Tamed wolves attack threats to the owner.

name: Cat
description: Passive mob that can be tamed with raw fish. Scares creepers and phantoms.

name: Parrot
description: Passive flying mob that can be tamed and mimics mob sounds.

name: Fox
description: Nocturnal passive mob that picks up items. Can be bred with sweet berries.

name: Bee
description: Flying passive mob that pollinates crops and produces honey. Becomes aggressive if hive is broken.

name: Bat
description: Flying passive mob that spawns in caves. No useful drops.

name: Squid
description: Passive water mob that drops ink sacs. Found in oceans and rivers.

name: Glow Squid
description: Passive glowing water mob that drops glow ink sacs.

name: Dolphin
description: Neutral water mob that gives swimmers a speed boost and leads to treasure.

name: Turtle
description: Passive beach mob that lays eggs on sand. Drops scutes when growing.

name: Polar Bear
description: Neutral mob found in snowy biomes. Protective of cubs.

name: Panda
description: Neutral mob found in bamboo jungles. Eats bamboo.

name: Ocelot
description: Passive jungle mob that can be tamed into a cat. Creepers avoid them.

name: Trader Llama
description: Llamas that follow wandering traders. Can be tamed.

name: Ravager
description: Large hostile mob that appears in raids. Breaks blocks and deals heavy damage.

name: Evoker
description: Hostile illager that summons vexes and fangs. Found in woodland mansions and raids.

name: Vindicator
description: Hostile illager armed with an axe. Found in mansions and raids.

name: Pillager
description: Hostile illager that shoots crossbows. Found in outposts and raids.

name: Vex
description: Small hostile flying mob summoned by evokers. Passes through blocks.
